name: Teuton Resources Corp.
description: Teuton Resources Corp. is a prospect generator holding interests in more than 23 properties in British Columbia's prolific Golden Triangle, with its most significant asset being a 20% carried interest in the Treaty Creek Project — host to the Goldstorm gold-copper deposit with approximately 23 million ounces of gold equivalent in resources. The company pioneered the prospect generator model in Canada, earning income through cash and equity payments from optionee companies while minimizing share dilution. Tudor Gold holds a 60% interest in Treaty Creek and is responsible for all exploration costs until a production decision.
